name: Kartoffel Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in lightly salted boiling water until tender (about 20- minutes). Drain and mash the potatoes.
2. Measure out 1 cup of mashed potatoes and cool to room temperature.
3. In a large bowl, cream together sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Beat in egg yolks.
4. Add potato mixture alternately with milk to the bowl. Mix well after each addition.
5. Fold in egg whites, nuts, and cherries. Turn batter into a greased floured 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 to 1 1/4 hours or until done. Do not invert.
7. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing. Cool on a rack.
8. For icing, combine sifted powdered sugar, vanilla, salt, and enough milk to make a good drizzling consistency.
9. Pour icing over cooled cake, allowing it to drip down the sides. Garnish with coconut and cherries if desired.
